description_long: This is a modern grave monument composed of a rectangular, light gray granite base with a slightly raised platform. At the head of the grave, two upright black granite slabs serve as the headstone, one taller and one shorter, both with polished surfaces. The taller slab features a gold-colored Latin cross and engraved inscriptions, while the shorter slab is plain. The base is smooth and flat, providing a stable foundation, and a thin black strip runs horizontally near the headstone, possibly for decorative or structural purposes. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, with sharp edges and clean lines. The materials and craftsmanship suggest durability and resistance to weathering.
description: A modern grave monument with a light gray granite base and two upright black granite headstones, one featuring a gold cross and inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two black granite headstones, with the taller slab on the right and the shorter on the left, both set on a light gray granite base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the granite base and the thin profile of the upright headstones at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inscriptions and gold cross on the taller headstone, with the full length of the granite base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the granite base and the thinness of the headstones, with the inscriptions partially visible.
